hooks.command:
bash -c '
FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_file_path:-}"

# ── Java 文件：触发 Maven 编译 ──
if [[ "$FILE" == *.java ]]; then
  MODULE=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E "s|.*(ruoyi-[^/]+)/.*|\1|")
  if [ -n "$MODULE" ]; then
    PROJ_ROOT=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E "s|(.*/)ruoyi-[^/]+/.*|\1|")
    echo "--- ☕ Maven compile: $MODULE ---"
    cd "$PROJ_ROOT" || { echo "❌ 无法进入项目目录: $PROJ_ROOT"; exit 0; }
    MVN_OUTPUT=$(mvn compile -pl "$MODULE" -am -q 2>&1)
    EXIT=$?
    echo "$MVN_OUTPUT" | tail -30
    if [ $EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
      echo "✅ 编译通过"
    else
      echo "❌ 编译失败，请检查上方错误（修复后再继续下一步）"
    fi
  fi
fi

# ── Vue 文件：触发 ESLint 检查 ──
if [[ "$FILE" == *.vue ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.js && "$FILE" == */ruoyi-ui/* ]]; then
  UI_ROOT=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E "s|(.*ruoyi-ui/).*|\1|")
  if [ -d "$UI_ROOT" ] && [ -f "$UI_ROOT/package.json" ]; then
    REL_FILE=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E "s|.*ruoyi-ui/||")
    echo "--- 🎨 ESLint: $REL_FILE ---"
    cd "$UI_ROOT" || exit 0
    LINT_OUT=$(npx eslint "$REL_FILE" --max-warnings=0 2>&1)
    EXIT=$?
    echo "$LINT_OUT" | tail -20
    if [ $EXIT -eq 0 ]; then
      echo "✅ ESLint 通过"
    else
      echo "⚠️  ESLint 发现问题，请检查上方输出"
    fi
  fi
fi
'

bash -c '
CMD="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_command:-}"
# 拦截危险的 git 操作，提醒确认
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git (push --force|reset --hard|checkout \.|clean -f)"; then
  echo "⛔ 检测到危险 git 操作，请用户确认后再执行！"
  exit 1
fi
exit 0
'
